basic_details.job_title: NTPC Assistant Chemist Trainee Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 40 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: NTPC Limited (A Govt. of India Enterprise), NTPC Bhawan, SCOPE Complex, 7, Institutional Area, Lodhi Road, New Delhi-110003
basic_details.total_vacancies: 40* (*subject to change as per organizational requirement)
basic_details.short_information: NTPC Limited, India's largest integrated power utility (A Govt. of India Enterprise), has published the Assistant Chemist Trainee (ACT) Recruitment Notification 2026 vide Advertisement No. 09/26. The recruitment drive aims to fill 40 vacancies for the post of Assistant Chemist Trainee (ACT). Candidates holding a Regular/Full-time M.Sc. in Chemistry from a recognized Indian University/Institute with a minimum 60% marks in aggregate are eligible to apply online at careers.ntpc.co.in. The application process will be active from 26 June 2026 to 10 July 2026, and candidates can access the notificat

application_fee.details: The application fee is non-refundable. Fees once paid will not be refunded under any circumstances. Candidates are therefore advised to verify their eligibility before paying the application fee. Fee can be paid online (Net Banking/Debit Card/Credit Card) or offline (through State Bank of India at a specially opened account). | Offline Payment: State Bank of India is authorized to collect the application fee in a specially opened account (No. 30987919993) at CAG branch, New Delhi, on behalf of NTPC. Candidate must approach the nearby SBI branch with a printout of the "pay-in-slip" available on the application portal. The journal number and branch code issued by the bank must be filled in the online application.

age_limit.details: The maximum age limit is calculated as on the last date of online application. Age relaxation is admissible to SC/ST, OBC, PwBD, and Ex-Servicemen candidates as per Government of India guidelines.

qualification.details: All computations of age, qualification, etc. shall be done with reference to the last date of receipt of online application. All qualifications should be from Universities/Institutions recognized and approved in India. The date of declaration of final result/issuance of final semester marksheet shall be deemed to be the date of acquiring the qualification – there shall be no relaxation on this account. | Educational Qualification | Note: Final year/semester students may apply; however, they will be considered for selection only if they are able to submit the prescribed final/provisional degree dated 31.07.2026 or before. If the specialization mentioned in the Degree/Provisional Degree is in variance to the degree requirement advertised, an institute's degree equivalence certificate must be uploaded. | Calculate your exact in-hand Salary in 10 seconds - Calculate Now

salary_details.pay_scale: Pay Scale of Rs. 30,000 – 1,20,000/- at Basic Pay of Rs. 30,000/- (E0 Grade)

selection_process: Part 1 Subject Knowledge Test (Chemistry) Must qualify separately
Part 2 Executive Aptitude Test Must qualify separately

candidates will be shortlisted for document verification/further selection process. Candidates must qualify separately in both parts of the Online Selection Test.

Candidates must qualify separately in both the Subject Knowledge Test and the Executive Aptitude Test. Shortlisting for document verification will be based on category-wise merit in the Online Selection Test.

The selected candidates will undergo one-year training at various places. The final place of posting will be decided after completion of training and the posting shall be at any of the Stations/Projects/JVs/Subsidiaries of NTPC. All posts are transferable at the sole discretion of Management.

000/-. They must serve the company for at least 3 years after successful completion of one-year training.
how_to_apply: Candidates need to apply online through the careers section at www.ntpc.co.in or directly visit careers.ntpc.co.in with a valid email ID. The Email ID entered in the online application form must remain valid for at least one year. No change in the Email ID will be allowed. All future correspondence will be sent by Email only.

After successful application, the system will generate a unique application number. Candidates must download the application slip and save/keep the printout generated by the system after successful application for all future correspondence.
Documents to be Uploaded at the Time of Online Application:
Class X Passing Certificate or Marksheet for Name/DOB proof (name must appear in conformity in all the documents)

M.Sc. (Chemistry) Degree – Final/Provisional Certificate (last issued marksheet to be submitted by appearing candidates; final/provisional degree certificate dated 31.07.2026 or before must be submitted if selected)
Final year or Consolidated Marksheet/Transcript clearly indicating aggregate percentage of marks in all semesters
Marks conversion formula from the University/Institute for conversion of marks in CGPA/CGPI/DGPA/CGI/CPI etc. into percentage (%). (Not required if marks are already awarded in percentage.)

Valid Caste/Category Certificate in the Government prescribed format (for SC/ST/OBC-NCL/PwBD/EWS candidates). OBC-NCL certificate should be in central format valid for FY 2026-27. EWS candidates must submit a valid Income & Asset Certificate for FY 2026-27 based on income of FY 2025-26 in the prescribed central format.
NTPC Assistant Chemist Trainee Recruitment 2026 Apply Online: Apply Here

content_sections.heading: NTPC Assistant Chemist Trainee Recruitment 2026 Important Dates

rows.event: Last Date for Final Year/Semester Students to expect Result

content_sections.heading: NTPC Assistant Chemist Trainee Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: A total of 40 projected vacancies have been announced for the post of Assistant Chemist Trainee (ACT). The vacancies are distributed across UR, EWS, OBC, SC, and ST categories. Current vacancies have been calculated as per the existing roster position. Reservation for PwBD candidates will be as per Government guidelines. The total number of projected vacancies may increase or decrease as per organizational requirement at the discretion of NTPC management. PwBD Identified Disabilities for Assistant Chemist Trainee: HH (Hard of Hearing), OA (One Arm), OL (One Leg), BL (Both Legs), OAL (One Arm and One Leg), LC (Leprosy Cured), Dw (Dwarfism), AAV (Acid Attack Victims), SLD (Specific Learning Disability), MI (Mental Illness), MD (Multiple Disabilities) involving the above categories.

content_sections.heading: NTPC Assistant Chemist Trainee Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: All computations of age, qualification, etc. shall be done with reference to the last date of receipt of online application. All qualifications should be from Universities/Institutions recognized and approved in India. The date of declaration of final result/issuance of final semester marksheet shall be deemed to be the date of acquiring the qualification – there shall be no relaxation on this account. Educational Qualification Note: Final year/semester students may apply; however, they will be considered for selection only if they are able to submit the prescribed final/provisional degree dated 31.07.2026 or before. If the specialization mentioned in the Degree/Provisional Degree is in variance to the degree requirement advertised, an institute's degree equivalence certificate must be uploaded. Calculate your exact in-hand Salary in 10 seconds - Calculate Now

rows.essential_educational_qualification: Regular/Full-time M.Sc . in Chemistry from a recognized Indian University/Institute recognized by appropriate statutory authority with at least 60% marks in aggregate. SC, ST, and PwBD candidates with passing marks are also eligible to apply for the post. Final year/semester students who expect their result by 31.07.2026 may also apply.

content_sections.heading: NTPC Assistant Chemist Trainee Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: The maximum age limit is calculated as on the last date of online application. Age relaxation is admissible to SC/ST, OBC, PwBD, and Ex-Servicemen candidates as per Government of India guidelines.

rows.age_limit_relaxation: Maximum 27 years as on the last date of online application

content_sections.heading: NTPC Assistant Chemist Trainee Recruitment 2026 - Application Fee
content_sections.text: The application fee is non-refundable. Fees once paid will not be refunded under any circumstances. Candidates are therefore advised to verify their eligibility before paying the application fee. Fee can be paid online (Net Banking/Debit Card/Credit Card) or offline (through State Bank of India at a specially opened account). Offline Payment: State Bank of India is authorized to collect the application fee in a specially opened account (No. 30987919993) at CAG branch, New Delhi, on behalf of NTPC. Candidate must approach the nearby SBI branch with a printout of the "pay-in-slip" available on the application portal. The journal number and branch code issued by the bank must be filled in the online application.

rows.category: SC / ST / PwBD / XSM (Ex-Servicemen) / Female Candidates

content_sections.heading: NTPC Assistant Chemist Trainee Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process & Exam Pattern
content_sections.text: Eligible candidates will appear for an All India based Online Selection Test. Based on category-wise merit and number of vacancies, candidates will be shortlisted for document verification/further selection process. Candidates must qualify separately in both parts of the Online Selection Test. Online Selection Test Pattern Candidates must qualify separately in both the Subject Knowledge Test and the Executive Aptitude Test. Shortlisting for document verification will be based on category-wise merit in the Online Selection Test. Placement & Service Bond The selected candidates will undergo one-year training at various places. The final place of posting will be decided after completion of training and the posting shall be at any of the Stations/Projects/JVs/Subsidiaries of NTPC. All posts are transferable at the sole discretion of Management. Selected candidates belonging to General, EWS, and OBC categories will be required to execute a service bond of Rs. 2,50,000/-. For candidates belonging to SC, ST, and PwBD categories, the service bond amount is Rs. 1,25,000/-. They must serve the company for at least 3 years after successful completion of one-year training.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for NTPC Assistant Chemist Trainee Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Candidates need to apply online through the careers section at www.ntpc.co.in or directly visit careers.ntpc.co.in with a valid email ID. The Email ID entered in the online application form must remain valid for at least one year. No change in the Email ID will be allowed. All future correspondence will be sent by Email only. After successful application, the system will generate a unique application number. Candidates must download the application slip and save/keep the printout generated by the system after successful application for all future correspondence. Documents to be Uploaded at the Time of Online Application: Class X Passing Certificate or Marksheet for Name/DOB proof (name must appear in conformity in all the documents) Copy of PAN Card M.Sc. (Chemistry) Degree – Final/Provisional Certificate (last issued marksheet to be submitted by appearing candidates; final/provisional degree certificate dated 31.07.2026 or before must be submitted if selected) Final year or Consolidated Marksheet/Transcript clearly indicating aggregate percentage of marks in all semesters Marks conversion formula from the University/Institute for conversion of marks in CGPA/CGPI/DGPA/CGI/CPI etc. into percentage (%). (Not required if marks are already awarded in percentage.) Valid Caste/Category Certificate in the Government prescribed format (for SC/ST/OBC-NCL/PwBD/EWS candidates). OBC-NCL certificate should be in central format valid for FY 2026-27. EWS candidates must submit a valid Income & Asset Certificate for FY 2026-27 based on income of FY 2025-26 in the prescribed central format. faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies in NTPC Assistant Chemist Trainee Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 40 projected vacancies have been announced for the post of Assistant Chemist Trainee (ACT) – 17 UR, 04 EWS, 10 OBC, 06 SC, and 03 ST. The total number of vacancies may increase or decrease as per organizational requirement at the discretion of NTPC management.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply online for NTPC ACT Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for NTPC Assistant Chemist Trainee Recruitment 2026 is 10 July 2026. The application window opens on 26 June 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well before the closing date to avoid last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for NTPC Assistant Chemist Trainee 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must hold a Regular/Full-time M.Sc. in Chemistry from a recognized Indian University/Institute with a minimum of 60% marks in aggregate. SC, ST, and PwBD candidates with passing marks are eligible. Final year/semester students who expect their result by 31.07.2026 may also apply.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for NTPC Assistant Chemist Trainee Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 27 years as on the last date of online application (10.07.2026) for General/UR/EWS candidates. Age relaxation of 5 years for SC/ST, 3 years for OBC, and 10 years for PwBD candidates is admissible as per Government guidelines.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for NTPC ACT Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: General, EWS, and OBC candidates must pay Rs. 500/- (non-refundable). SC, ST, PwBD, Ex-Servicemen (XSM), and Female candidates are exempted from paying the application fee. The fee can be paid online (Net Banking/Debit/Credit Card) or offline through State Bank of India.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for NTPC Assistant Chemist Trainee Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection consists of an All India based Online Selection Test comprising two parts – Subject Knowledge Test (Chemistry) and Executive Aptitude Test. Candidates must qualify separately in both parts. Based on category-wise merit, candidates will be shortlisted for document verification. There is no interview.

faq.question: Q7. What is the pay scale for NTPC Assistant Chemist Trainee post?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will be placed in the pay scale of Rs. 30,000 – 1,20,000/- at a basic pay of Rs. 30,000/- (E0 Grade). They will also be eligible for Dearness Allowance, other perquisites and allowances, terminal benefits, etc. as per company rules in force from time to time during training/after absorption.

faq.question: Q8. Is there a service bond for NTPC ACT selected candidates?
faq.answer: Yes. Selected candidates belonging to General, EWS, and OBC categories must execute a service bond of Rs. 2,50,000/-, and SC, ST, and PwBD candidates must execute a service bond of Rs. 1,25,000/-. They are required to serve NTPC for at least 3 years after successful completion of the one-year training period.

faq.question: Q9. Can final year M.Sc. Chemistry students apply for NTPC ACT 2026?
faq.answer: Yes. Final year/semester students who expect their result by 31.07.2026 may apply. However, they will be considered for selection only if they can submit the prescribed final/provisional degree dated 31.07.2026 or before. There is no relaxation on this account.

faq.question: Q10. Where will selected NTPC Assistant Chemist Trainees be posted?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will undergo one-year training at various places. The final place of posting will be decided after completion of training and shall be at any of the Stations/Projects/JVs/Subsidiaries of NTPC across India. All posts are transferable at the sole discretion of NTPC management.
